---
title: "Life Expectancy and GDP per Capita"
---

This page explores how life expectancy relates to GDP per capita across countries over time

```{python}
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

df = pd.read_csv("gapminder.csv")

plt.figure()
plt.scatter(df["gdp_per_capita"], df["life_expectancy"], alpha=0.3)
plt.xscale("log")
plt.xlabel("GDP per capita (log scale)")
plt.ylabel("Life expectancy")
plt.title("Life expectancy vs GDP per capita (all country-years)")
plt.show()
```
